name: Lead Intake & Dedup Pipeline - Sanitized Portfolio Blueprint
description: This is a public-safe workflow blueprint. Reconnect real credentials and endpoints inside n8n before use.

steps.name: Receive lead
steps.input: lead submission from form, messenger, ads, or manual import

steps.name: Normalize fields
logic: build dedup key from phone first, then email

steps.name: Create or update CRM lead
steps.behavior: update existing lead if duplicate exists, otherwise create a new lead

steps.name: Notify sales team
steps.message_template: New qualified lead: name, contact, source, CRM link
